questions.question_text: Write a précis of the following and suggest a suitable title.
Read the following passage carefully and answer the questions given at the end.
How does the author characterize the concept of civil society?
Why does civil society strive towards better socialization driven by tolerance?
What do you understand by the term ‘Social Capital’ used in this passage?
Why does a civil society assume the role of a public stakeholder?
What impact is feared by the weakening state of civil society?
Correct only FIVE of the following:
Punctuate the following text, where necessary.
Re-write the following sentences (ONLY FIVE) after filling in the blanks with appropriate Prepositions.
Use only FIVE pairs of words in sentences clearly illustrating their meanings.
Translate the following into English by keeping in view figurative/idiomatic expressions.
